summary: End-to-end testing of Synology Cloud Dashboard demo mode. All 10 backend pytest tests passed (auth, listings, storage, folders, AI search with Claude Sonnet 4.5, favorites round-trip). Frontend flows (login, dashboard, sidebar nav x5, photos+lightbox, videos+modal, documents filter, AI search with interpretation chips) all functional.

issues: Radix Dialog console warnings: missing DialogTitle and aria-describedby (a11y for screen readers). Wrap title with VisuallyHidden if visually undesired.
React DOM warning: 'showCloseButton' prop being passed to a DOM element instead of being consumed/destructured. Should be filtered before spreading props.

action_items: (Optional) Fix Radix DialogContent a11y: add DialogTitle (or VisuallyHidden wrapper) and aria description in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/dialog.jsx callers (Photos lightbox, Videos modal).
(Optional) Filter `showCloseButton` prop before spreading onto DOM in dialog wrapper to remove React unknown-prop warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: SESSIONS is in-memory dict — sessions lost on restart and not shared across workers. Acceptable for demo MVP; document or move to Mongo/Redis for production.
server.py /api/storage/info returns DEMO_STORAGE even for real NAS sessions (line 279). Comment acknowledges placeholder; flag to user that real-NAS storage stats are not implemented.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); migrate to lifespan handler (FastAPI 0.100+).
Logout endpoint returns 200 even when no Authorization header — by design for idempotency; OK.
Bearer token parsing uses .replace('Bearer ', '') which would also strip the substring mid-token if present; minor robustness — prefer split.
test_credentials: Demo mode — no credentials required. POST /api/auth/synology/login {demo:true}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Demo mode is fully exercised by /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (10 tests, all green). AI search via Claude Sonnet 4.5 (emergentintegrations + EMERGENT_LLM_KEY) returns valid date_from/date_to for 'photos de l été 2024' and type=document for 'documents factures'. Frontend Login → Dashboard → Sidebar nav (Photos/Vidéos/Documents/Favoris/Dossiers) → Photos lightbox → Videos modal (with <video>) → Documents filter → AI search /search?q=... with interpretation chips (type, keywords, date range) all verified visually. Real Synology NAS path (demo=false) is NOT covered by tests per request. Logout button has French label 'Se déconnecter' (not 'Déconnexion'); ensure data-testid='logout-btn' for stable automation if not already present.
